auth.label: API Token
auth.description: SiteSpeakAI API token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Generate one from your SiteSpeakAI account page: https://sitespeak.ai/user/api-tokens

actions.name: delete_updated_answer
actions.description: Delete one SiteSpeakAI updated answer from a chatbot.

finetune_id.description: The ID of the updated answer to delete.

outputSchema.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: get_chatbot
actions.description: Retrieve the full SiteSpeakAI settings object for one chatbot.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot to retrieve from SiteSpeakAI.

chatbot.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Retrieve the connected SiteSpeakAI user account details.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

user.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: list_chatbots
actions.description: List every SiteSpeakAI chatbot available to the connected account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

outputSchema.description: The SiteSpeakAI chatbots available to the account.

actions.name: list_conversations
actions.description: Retrieve conversation history for one SiteSpeakAI chatbot.

conversation_id.description: Return only entries for this visitor conversation ID.

include_deleted.description: Whether cleared conversation entries should be included.

include_sources.description: Whether SiteSpeakAI should include source records for each conversation entry.

limit.description: The maximum number of conversation entries to return.

order.description: The sort order for the returned conversation history.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot and optional filters for retrieving conversation history.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

conversations.description: The conversation entries returned by SiteSpeakAI.

outputSchema.description: The conversation history returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: list_leads
actions.description: List the leads captured by one SiteSpeakAI chatbot.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot whose captured leads should be returned.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

leads.description: The lead records returned by SiteSpeakAI.

outputSchema.description: The leads captured by the chatbot.

actions.name: list_sources
actions.description: List the training sources and training statuses for one SiteSpeakAI chatbot.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot whose training sources should be returned.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

sources.description: The sources attached to the chatbot.

outputSchema.description: The training sources returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: list_suggested_messages
actions.description: List the suggested visitor prompts configured for one SiteSpeakAI chatbot.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot whose suggested messages should be returned.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

prompts.description: The suggested messages for the chatbot.

outputSchema.description: The suggested messages returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: list_updated_answers
actions.description: List updated answers configured for one SiteSpeakAI chatbot.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot whose updated answers should be returned.

items.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.

finetunes.description: The updated answers for the chatbot.

outputSchema.description: The updated answers returned by SiteSpeakAI.

actions.name: query_chatbot
actions.description: Send a question to one SiteSpeakAI chatbot and return its answer plus source URLs.

prompt.description: The question or prompt to send to the chatbot.

conversation_id.description: An optional identifier used to group messages into one chatbot conversation.

format.description: The response format returned by SiteSpeakAI.

inputSchema.description: The chatbot and message payload to send to SiteSpeakAI.

text.description: The answer text returned by the chatbot.

urls.description: The source URLs used by the chatbot to answer the query.

actions.name: upsert_updated_answer
actions.description: Create or update a SiteSpeakAI custom answer for a chatbot.

question.description: The question associated with the updated answer.

suggested_answer.description: The custom answer SiteSpeakAI should return.

inputSchema.description: The custom answer to create or update.

outputSchema.description: A provider object returned by SiteSpeakAI.
